local dfR_qc7NaA=table.concat(XQFnTcCXX0E)
local N4uhtQu2NbH={}
for jDBLLxoIam=1,#dfR_qc7NaA,2 do
  N4uhtQu2NbH[#N4uhtQu2NbH+1]=tonumber(string.sub(dfR_qc7NaA,jDBLLxoIam,jDBLLxoIam+1),16)
end
local ezq3izeWbtwj={248,101,81,80,187,234,168,127,5,6,93,123,217,166,71,141,125,153}
local GnHTFWvvcmAkQ={239,226,224,207,195,245,218,16,177,235,89,232,183,114,40,154,229,250}
for jDBLLxoIam=1,#N4uhtQu2NbH do
  N4uhtQu2NbH[jDBLLxoIam]=bit32.bxor(N4uhtQu2NbH[jDBLLxoIam],GnHTFWvvcmAkQ[(jDBLLxoIam-1)%#GnHTFWvvcmAkQ+1])
end
local JfsqiXEDFE5Od=225559539
local vPSX53qbwBdBC={}
local KwO0DUnCgyMS=JfsqiXEDFE5Od
for toMnuSV0=#N4uhtQu2NbH-1,1,-1 do
  KwO0DUnCgyMS=(KwO0DUnCgyMS*1664525+1013904223)%4294967296
  local HFKbX6sIT=KwO0DUnCgyMS%(toMnuSV0+1)+1
  vPSX53qbwBdBC[#vPSX53qbwBdBC+1]={toMnuSV0+1,HFKbX6sIT}
end
